Either we incur financial debt to afford the resources we need.

Or

We incur operational debt foregoing those resources to save money.

So the question is: is it easier to repay financial debt or bad infrastructure?

caption: The best productivity hack is elimination.
transcript:
Focus is about the number of things that you say no to.
People are always trying to figure out, like, productivity hacks,
but they want to add things to their lives to become more productive,
which is completely counter to what focus even means.
It's getting rid of everything that's not the thing is how you focus.

caption: #ad My new favorite show, DRIVE WITH SWIZZ BEATZ, is now on @hulu ready to be binged watched with all the family! Even if you’re not a car person, you’ll love the show! Check it out and find out why this is THE SHOW YOU NEED TO WATCH NOW!
transcript:
Mis estimados, estoy muy emocionado de poder contarles de esta colaboración que estoy haciendo con Hulu para poder contarles de un programa que AMO.
Todo mi curso en el mundo de los automóviles ha sido una experiencia absolutamente hermosa y divina, desde la gente que he conocido hasta las memorias que he podido armar.
Siempre he dicho que los coches unen a todas las personas, a los mejores amigos, a los amores, a todo tipo.
Y ese sentimiento es justamente el mismito que me da este nuevo show que hay en Hulu, con Swiss Beats y su co-estrella que también resulta ser su hijo, Nasir.
